name: Miramar Resources Limited
summary: Miramar Resources Limited explores for mineral properties. The company primarily explores for gold, nickel, copper, and platinum group element deposits. It holds interests in three underexplored gold projects, including the Gidji JV, Glandore, and Randalls located within the Eastern Goldfields to the north of Kalgoorlie region; three projects covering under-explored greenstone belts, such as the Lang Well, Lakeside, and Garden Gully in Murchison region; and two projects comprising the Whaleshark and Bangemall in Gascoyne region in Western Australia. The company was incorporated in 2019 and is headquartered in South Perth, Australia.
